query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `email_provider_config` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `organizationId` int NOT NULL,
  `provider` enum('sendgrid', 'mailgun', 'aws_ses') NOT NULL,
  `apiKey` longtext NOT NULL,
  `apiKeyLastRotated` timestamp NULL,
  `mailgunDomain` varchar(255) NULL,
  `awsRegion` varchar(50) NULL,
  `awsAccessKeyId` longtext NULL,
  `awsSecretAccessKey` longtext NULL,
  `webhookUrl` varchar(500) NULL,
  `webhookSigningKey` longtext NULL,
  `isActive` tinyint DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  `isVerified` tinyint DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `lastTestAt` timestamp NULL,
  `lastTestStatus` enum('success', 'failed') NULL,
  `lastTestError` longtext NULL,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `updatedBy` int NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `email_provider_config_org_provider_idx` (`organizationId`, `provider`),
  INDEX `email_provider_config_organization_id_idx` (`organizationId`),
  INDEX `email_provider_config_provider_idx` (`provider`),
  CONSTRAINT `email_provider_config_organizationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`organizationId`) REFERENCES `organizations` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `email_delivery_status` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `organizationId` int NOT NULL,
  `outboxId` int NOT NULL,
  `provider` enum('sendgrid', 'mailgun', 'aws_ses', 'microsoft_365', 'manus_custom') NOT NULL,
  `currentStatus` enum('queued', 'sending', 'sent', 'delivered', 'bounced', 'complained', 'opened', 'clicked', 'failed') DEFAULT 'queued' NOT NULL,
  `previousStatus` enum('queued', 'sending', 'sent', 'delivered', 'bounced', 'complained', 'opened', 'clicked', 'failed') NULL,
  `bounceType` enum('hard', 'soft', 'unknown') NULL,
  `bounceSubtype` varchar(50) NULL,
  `complaintType` enum('spam', 'abuse', 'auth_failure', 'not_spam') NULL,
  `deliveredAt` timestamp NULL,
  `openedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `clickedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `lastEventAt` timestamp NULL,
  `lastEventType` varchar(50) NULL,
  `eventCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `metadata` json NULL,
  `statusChangedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `email_delivery_status_outbox_id_idx` (`outboxId`),
  INDEX `email_delivery_status_organization_id_idx` (`organizationId`),
  INDEX `email_delivery_status_current_status_idx` (`currentStatus`),
  INDEX `email_delivery_status_status_changed_at_idx` (`statusChangedAt`),
  CONSTRAINT `email_delivery_status_organizationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`organizationId`) REFERENCES `organizations` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `email_delivery_status_outboxId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`outboxId`) REFERENCES `email_outbox` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `email_template_version` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `organizationId` int NOT NULL,
  `templateId` int NOT NULL,
  `versionNumber` int NOT NULL,
  `templateKey` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `nameAr` varchar(255) NULL,
  `subject` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `subjectAr` varchar(500) NULL,
  `bodyHtml` longtext NOT NULL,
  `bodyHtmlAr` longtext NULL,
  `changeDescription` longtext NULL,
  `changeDescriptionAr` longtext NULL,
  `isPublished` tinyint DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `publishedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `publishedBy` int NULL,
  `isABTestVersion` tinyint DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `abTestId` int NULL,
  `trafficPercentage` decimal(5, 2) NULL,
  `sentCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `deliveredCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `openedCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `clickedCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `bouncedCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `complainedCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `email_template_version_template_id_version_idx` (`templateId`, `versionNumber`),
  INDEX `email_template_version_organization_id_idx` (`organizationId`),
  INDEX `email_template_version_template_id_idx` (`templateId`),
  INDEX `email_template_version_is_published_idx` (`isPublished`),
  INDEX `email_template_version_ab_test_id_idx` (`abTestId`),
  CONSTRAINT `email_template_version_organizationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`organizationId`) REFERENCES `organizations` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `email_template_version_templateId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`templateId`) REFERENCES `email_templates` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `email_template_ab_test` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `organizationId` int NOT NULL,
  `templateId` int NOT NULL,
  `testName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `testNameAr` varchar(255) NULL,
  `testDescription` longtext NULL,
  `testDescriptionAr` longtext NULL,
  `versionAId` int NOT NULL,
  `versionBId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft', 'running', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  `trafficSplitPercentage` decimal(5, 2) DEFAULT 50.00 NOT NULL,
  `startedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `endedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `winnerId` int NULL,
  `winnerMetric` enum('open_rate', 'click_rate', 'conversion_rate', 'bounce_rate') NULL,
  `versionASentCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `versionAOpenCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `versionAClickCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `versionAConversionCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `versionBSentCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `versionBOpenCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `versionBClickCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `versionBConversionCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `confidenceLevel` decimal(5, 2) NULL,
  `pValue` decimal(10, 8) NULL,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `updatedBy` int NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `email_template_ab_test_template_id_idx` (`templateId`),
  INDEX `email_template_ab_test_organization_id_idx` (`organizationId`),
  INDEX `email_template_ab_test_status_idx` (`status`),
  INDEX `email_template_ab_test_winner_id_idx` (`winnerId`),
  CONSTRAINT `email_template_ab_test_organizationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`organizationId`) REFERENCES `organizations` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `email_template_ab_test_templateId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`templateId`) REFERENCES `email_templates` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `email_template_ab_test_versionAId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`versionAId`) REFERENCES `email_template_version` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `email_template_ab_test_versionBId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`versionBId`) REFERENCES `email_template_version` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
